summary: Orphic Hymns chunks malformed — section bloat, hymn-number mismatch, source nav noise
description:
## Findings

All 141 chunks under corpus/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns/ have malformed metadata, surfaced by a `python -m guru query "What is gnosis?" --verbose` showing the entire hymn body as the citation header.

## Three compounding causes

**Bug 1 — `_extract_title` captures entire body as title**
`scripts/chunkers/page_chunker.py:36` does `content.split("\n")[:10]`. Orphic raw is single-line (no newlines), so the loop runs once with line=full_content. The regex `^(?:[IVXLCDM]+|SECT)\.\s+(?:TO\s+)?(.+?)[\.\*]?\s*$` then matches the entire string and `m.group(1)` becomes the whole body. Format string `"Hymn {n}. {title}"` produces the bloated section header. Affects every Orphic chunk.

**Bug 2 — filename number ≠ hymn number**
`raw/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns-NN.txt` is paginated by source page, not by hymn. Spot check:
- `orphic-hymns-22.txt` contains hymn XV (To Juno)
- `orphic-hymns-29.txt` contains hymn XXII (To Nereus) — chunk 063 reads "Hymn 29" but the body is hymn 22
- `orphic-hymns-63.txt` contains hymn LVI (To Terrestrial Hermes)
The chunker's `number_source = "filename"` extracts the page number and labels it as a hymn number with an offset that grows through the book.

**Bug 3 — source navigation cruft retained in body**
Every chunk body starts with `"Sacred Texts Classics Index Previous Next "` and ends with `"Next: XXIII: To the Nereids"`-style nav. Pollutes embeddings — the cosine similarity to the nav text pulls these chunks into unrelated queries.

## Fix path (children)

1. C1 — chunker change (cap title length, generic across sources)
2. C2 — Orphic-specific normalizer at acquire/chunk time (strip nav, split page-blob on `^[IVXLCDM]+\.\s+TO\s+` boundaries)
3. C3 — re-chunk + re-embed via the pipeline (`scripts/chunk.py` → `scripts/embed_corpus.py --reindex --tradition greek_mystery --text orphic-hymns`)

## Constraint

Do **not** hand-edit `corpus/**/*.toml` or `raw/**/*.txt`. Fix lives in the chunker code or `chunking/greek_mystery/orphic-hymns.toml` config; the data is regenerated.

resolution.note: All 4 children landed: 8b4f303d (page_chunker title-length cap), dc8a8e00 (Orphic normalizer + sentence-head titles + no-match label fallback), d47747c4 (scripts/cleanup_orphic_pre_rechunk.sh audit + re-embed wrapper), 10917af0 (corpus TOML regenerated, 141 chunks). 155 unit + chunking tests pass. Operator handoff: scripts/cleanup_orphic_pre_rechunk.sh --apply after PR merges to re-embed against clean bodies.
